originalTitle: This investing strategy digs deeper to find hidden stocks riding the AI wave
summary: There are plenty of ways to jump into the generative-AI hardware infrastructure expansion beyond the familiar chip makers and hyperscalers.
content: There are plenty of ways to jump into the generative-AI hardware infrastructure expansion beyond the familiar chip makers and hyperscalers.
chineseTitle: 这种投资策略深入挖掘，寻找乘着 AI 浪潮的隐藏股票
chineseSummary: 除了熟悉的芯片制造商和超大规模企业之外，还有很多方法可以进入生成式人工智能硬件基础设施的扩展。
chineseContent: 除了熟悉的芯片制造商和超大规模企业之外，还有很多方法可以进入生成式人工智能硬件基础设施的扩展。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
